gold_crown.title: Obtain the Gold Crown from the Genie (As You Wish) — only source in the pack, not craftable, not droppable

three_wishes.title: Use all 3 Genie wishes on the Magic Lamp (As You Wish) — choose the final wish carefully

subtitle.text: 3 wishes. The Gold Crown comes from the Genie and nowhere else. The final wish is permanent. Choose correctly.

description: CH.17 · THE GENIE'S FINAL WISHES
▸ As You Wish gives the player 3 wishes.',
The Magic Lamp holds them.',
The Gold Crown is obtained exclusively from the Genie —',
it is not in any craft recipe or loot table.',
Wishing for the Crown is the recommended use of wish 1.',
Wishes 2 and 3 are yours to define.',
◈ GENIE SOURCE + MAGIC LAMP
└ Genie: found in Genie Tombstone (desert biome structure)',
Tombstone appears in desert — survey with Elytra',
└ Magic Lamp: item dropped/given by the Genie',
(check As You Wish mod mechanics for exact acquisition)',
└ Lamp holds 3 wishes total — consumable, not repeatable',
(one Genie = one lamp = three wishes)',
◈ THE GOLD CROWN
└ Gold Crown (irons_spellbooks:gold_crown): ISS equipment item',
Provides ISS bonuses — check JEI for exact effect',
└ ONLY obtainable from the Genie wish',
Not craftable. Not in any loot table. Genie exclusive.',
└ Recommended: use Wish 1 to obtain the Gold Crown',
before wishing for anything else',
└ Equip: head slot (replaces helmet OR as separate slot)',
(check mod compatibility with armor slots)',
◈ WISH RECOMMENDATIONS
└ Wish 1: Gold Crown (ISS equipment, unique item)',
└ Wish 2: Large material grant OR unique item you cannot obtain elsewhere',
(check As You Wish wish options in-game — what can be wished for)',
└ Wish 3: Final wish — permanent mechanical benefit',
(some As You Wish options are permanent effects)',
└ Do not wish for random items you can craft',
Reserve wishes for: unique items, permanent effects, large grants',
▸ Every civilization that encountered the Genie',
used one wish on the wrong thing.',
One wished for safety.',
One wished for more wishes (it did not work).',
One wished for the dragon to stop.',
None of them wished for the Gold Crown.',
Because none of them had spent 9 chapters studying ISS magic.',
You have.',
First wish: the Crown.',
▶ Obtain the Gold Crown from the Genie [check]
▶ Use all 3 wishes from the Magic Lamp [check]
◇ If a second Genie Tombstone exists in the world:',
explore for it before finalizing your wish strategy.',
Each Tombstone is one Genie is one Lamp is three wishes.',
The world generates Genie Tombstones at a fixed rate.',
Antique Atlas + Elytra: survey all deserts before committing.
